result:
70 個 `.c` 檔案直接 `#include "server.h"`,全部位於 `src/` 目錄下:

```
src/acl.c          src/eval.c            src/module.c           src/sentinel.c
src/aof.c          src/evict.c           src/multi.c            src/server.c
src/bio.c          src/expire.c          src/networking.c       src/slowlog.c
src/bitops.c       src/fwtree.c          src/notify.c           src/socket.c
src/blocked.c      src/gcra.c            src/object.c           src/sort.c
src/call_reply.c   src/hotkeys.c         src/pubsub.c           src/sparkline.c
src/childinfo.c    src/hyperloglog.c     src/rdb.c              src/sparsearray.c
src/cluster_asm.c  src/iothread.c        src/redis-check-aof.c  src/syncio.c
src/cluster_legacy.c src/keymeta.c       src/redis-check-rdb.c  src/t_array.c
src/cluster.c      src/latency.c         src/replication.c      src/t_hash.c
src/commands.c     src/lazyfree.c        src/resp_parser.c      src/t_list.c
src/config.c       src/logreqres.c       src/rio.c              src/t_set.c
src/connection.c   src/lolwut.c          src/script_lua.c       src/t_stream.c
src/crc16.c        src/lolwut5.c         src/script.c            src/t_string.c
src/db.c           src/lolwut6.c                                 src/t_zset.c
src/debug.c        src/lolwut8.c                                 src/threads_mngr.c
src/defrag.c       src/memory_prefetch.c                         src/timeout.c
src/entry.c        src/estore.c                                  src/tls.c
                                                                  src/tracking.c
                                                                  src/unix.c
```

方法:`grep -rl '#include "server.h"' --include="*.c" .` 找出所有直接以雙引號形式 include `server.h` 的 `.c` 檔案(逐一列出後以 `nl` 確認共 70 筆,無重複)。`deps/`、`modules/`、`tests/` 等目錄下沒有任何 `.c` 檔案 include 這個 `server.h`(它是 Redis/Valkey 主體專屬的核心標頭,定義於 `src/server.h`)。
